exemption_claim.en: This product is exempt under the applicable provisions.
exemption_claim.fr: Ce produit est exempte selon les dispositions applicables.

customer_formula_statements.en: List of materials: compost, peat moss, and perlite.
customer_formula_statements.fr: Liste des materiaux : compost, tourbe et perlite.

intended_use_statements.en: For ornamental plants and garden beds.
intended_use_statements.fr: Pour les plantes ornementales et les plates-bandes.

processing_instruction_statements.fr: Melanger dans la couche superieure du sol avant usage.

directions_for_use_statements.en: Apply evenly and water after application.
directions_for_use_statements.fr: Appliquer uniformement et arroser apres application.
